area: Team Agents / direct provider permission scope
finding: Concrete OpenAI and Anthropic Team bridge execution passed `scopedPaths: []`, so the shared permission broker rejected every paid role even though the task had a governed allowed-file scope.
expectedBehavior: Direct provider roles must receive the normalized task allowed files; the broker must continue rejecting truly empty scopes.
evidenceOrRepro: `TASK-TEAM-0066` runs `team-74228cfda35d` and `team-f8ef2357ca7b` reached 10 and 4 provider executions respectively but all roles failed. A direct `launchAnthropicTeamProviderRun` probe exposed `Permission denied by governed broker policy or missing scoped paths`, while the same key/model returned HTTP 200 directly.
followUp: Fix in `TASK-TEAM-0068` with deterministic injected-executor coverage, then rerun paid dogfood.
